resources.string:
<html>
            <head>
                <title>Title</title>
                <style type="text/css">
                    @font-face {
                        font-family: materialistic;
                        src: url("file:///android_asset/%1$s")}
                    body {
                        font-family: materialistic;
                        font-size: %2$fpx;
                        color: #%3$s;
                        margin: %6$fpx %7$fpx %6$fpx %7$fpx;
                        line-height: %8$f;
                    }
                    a {color: #%4$s;}
                    img {display: inline; height: auto; max-width: 100%%;}
                    pre {white-space: pre-wrap;}
                    iframe {width: 90vw; height: 50.625vw;} /* 16:9 */
                </style>
            </head>
            <body>%5$s</body>
        </html>

Afterglow v0.1.0

The first public pre-release. Thanks for testing.

  • Offline reading: an explicit offline mode, per-item cache status indicators, cache size and clear controls, and clearer empty states when you are offline.
  • Polish from testing: the app bar stays pinned at the top, Settings returns to Top Stories, the theme picker is tidied up, and the launcher icon has more breathing room.
  • The story list now keeps its place after you open a story and press Back.

This is a pre-release installed directly as an APK, not from the Play Store.
